expectations.evidence: Inventory lists skills from both directories with sync status

expectations.text: Classifies each skill into one of the 9 categories
expectations.evidence: Uses ad-hoc A/B/C grading without any category taxonomy. No classification system.

expectations.text: Provides per-skill individual scoring (not just a generic summary)
expectations.evidence: Each skill has its own section with a letter grade and specific findings
Has 'Architecture Observations' but no systematic gap analysis against skill categories or repo contents
Has P0/P1/P2 priority tiers in the Top Findings section
Specific suggestions like 'add simplify to Claude managed skills list', 'Replace @eN refs with guidance to discover refs via snapshot'
